title: Silvermons (Cobblemon)
description: The Official Cobblemon Modpack for the Silvermons Cobblemon Server.
body:
# **✨ Welcome to Silvermons! ✨**
The Official Cobblemon Modpack for the **Silvermons** Cobblemon Server. **Silvermons** is a non pay-to-win friendly community Cobblemon server with content for both casual and competitive players.

# **❓ What does this Modpack do? ❓**

- Mods and assets to make your client more compatible with the Silvermons server. It is not required to play on the server.
- Optimization mods for better FPS, reduced lag, and smoother gameplay.
- Utilities like a minimap and visual enhancements that enhance gameplay and make Silvermons more immersive.

# **🌍 How to join! 🌍**
- Server: **https://modrinth.com/server/silvermons**
- Server IP: **play.silvermons.com**
- Discord: **discord.gg/silvermons**
- We are running Cobblemon Fabric on Minecraft 1.21.1
